RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE
TRANSIT's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT -- Granted; no triable issue of fact exists re:
failure to file a claim under the California Tort Claims Act. Defendant is to
prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437c(g). (PHA/301/EH) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
